benefits.description: helps calibrate sleep cycles; felt more rested despite not sleeping immediately; memory processing; less emotional upon waking, similar to deep sleep or psilocybin experience; restful sleep feeling

side_effects.description: waking up 1 hour earlier than normal
didn't help with insomnia on last two days of week

protocol_notes: 5mg bottle; at 250mcg per dose, approximately 20 nights of testing per bottle; does not need to be used consistently; heard reports that 500mcg may produce sedation in some users
